prestazioni: RB26DETT engine: Full forged internals with Tomei 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a Tomei Type-M 2.8L stroker crankshaft for a 2.8L displacement, paired with a Tomei 272° duration camshaft set and Tomei adjustable cam gears for optimized valve timing

Turbocharger upgrade: Twin Garrett GT2860-5 ball-bearing turbos with custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipes, HKS SSQV blow-off valves, and a custom front-mount intercooler by GReddy with a 3.5-inch core for maximum heat dissipation and airflow efficiency

Fuel and ignition system: Nismo 550cc injectors with an HKS F-CON V Pro standalone ECU, Walbro 450LPH in-tank fuel pump, and HKS GT2835 ignition coils, complemented by a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system with a Tomei 70mm titanium exhaust and HKS Hi-Power Spec-S mufflers
estetica: Body kit: Veilside Fortune 99 widebody conversion with custom carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a Veilside GT rear wing, all finished in Nissan Bayside Blue (KH3) with a 3M matte clear coat

Wheels and suspension: Work Meister S1 3P 18x10.5 +15 front and 18x12 +20 rear wheels with Toyo R888R 275/35/18 and 315/30/18 tires, paired with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 8kg/mm front and 10kg/mm rear springs for aggressive stance and track-ready handling

Interior and details: Bride Zeta III bucket seats with Takata 4-point harnesses, Nismo R32 GT-R carbon fiber dashboard and door cards, and a custom half-cage by AutoPower Industries with a bolt-in X-brace for chassis rigidity, finished with a Defi BF series gauge cluster (oil pressure, boost, and water temp) mounted on a custom A-pillar pod
